analysis.cannotLocate: Could not locate the exact fragment in the text.
analysis.exhaustiveRunning: The deep analysis is running. You will receive results when it finishes.
analysis.exhaustiveQueue: In queue. Analysis will take a few minutes.
analysis.exhaustiveDesc: Analyzes the entire corpus in greater depth. Cost: 30 credits.
analysis.variablePricingNote: With your plan, the final cost may be lower.
analysis.reanalysisNote: Re-analysis compares again against all updated documentation.
analysis.recommendationNoIndexar: This document is almost identical to an existing one. Adding it to the corpus would create duplication.
analysis.recommendationRevisar: Differences were detected that could cause contradictory answers. Verify which version is correct.
analysis.recommendationIndexar: The document adds value and can be confidently added to the corpus.
analysis.quickContradictionsDesc: At least {count} possible contradictions with other corpus documents were detected. These have not been verified with double-checking.
analysis.quickExhaustivePrompt: Run the deep analysis to verify all of them with double-checking.
analysis.reanalyzeStyleTitle: Re-analyze only the style of the current text
analysis.reanalyzeAllTitle: Re-analyze contradictions and duplicates against the corpus
analysis.fragmentNotFound: This fragment is no longer in the text (you may have edited it).

improvement.title: Improvement Mode
improvement.problemsDetected: {count, plural, one {# issue detected} other {# issues detected}}
improvement.discardConfirm: Discard changes and close? The original file will be deleted.
improvement.existingDocDescSuffix: is already indexed. What do you want to do with the corrected version?
improvement.keepBothDesc: Indexed as a new document with suffix "(corrected …)".
improvement.replaceOriginalDesc: Replaces the existing document keeping the same name.
improvement.duplicateMissingRef: This duplicate has no reference fragment. Check it manually.
improvement.duplicateNotFound: The duplicate fragment was not found in the text. It may have been deleted.
improvement.problemDismissedPersist: Issue dismissed: "{title}". It won't appear in future re-analyses.
improvement.problemRestoredPersist: Issue restored: "{title}". It will be checked again in the next re-analysis.
improvement.reanalyzeFailed: Could not re-analyze, try again in a few seconds.
improvement.mobileNoticeTitle: AI Improvement works best on a computer
improvement.mobileNoticeBody: Editing documents with AI needs a wide screen to review the text, compare issues and apply changes comfortably. Open this document on a computer to improve it.

landing.heroSubtitle: A private AI chat that answers only with your documents. Detects contradictions, duplicates, and issues before they reach your team.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to manage your documentation
landing.problemTitle: Your team wastes time searching for information that already exists
landing.problem1Text: Documents scattered across folders, drives and emails. Nobody knows where the correct version is.
landing.problem2Text: One manual says one thing, a protocol says another. And nobody notices until it causes a problem.
landing.problem3Text: Searching, re-reading, asking colleagues. Your team spends hours finding what should be accessible.
landing.productDesc: Ask, analyze and improve your documentation without leaving the platform.
landing.showcase1Title: Ask and get answers with sources
landing.showcase1Desc: Your team stops searching folders. Ask in natural language and AI answers citing exactly where each piece of data comes from. Only uses your documentation — never invents.
landing.showcase2Desc: Every document you upload is analyzed against your existing corpus. Contradictions, duplicates, outdated information — all detected automatically.
landing.showcase3Desc: We don't leave you alone with a list of errors. The integrated editor shows each issue, proposes the correction and applies it with one click.
landing.teamsTitle: One workspace for your whole team
landing.teamsDesc: Upload documents once and your whole team can query them. The admin manages members, plans, and usage. Everyone asks, AI answers from the same shared document base.
landing.teamsF1: Invite your team with a link
landing.teamsF2: Usage panel by user and operation
landing.diffTitle: We don't just search. We analyze quality.
landing.diffDesc: Other products let you search your documents. We also analyze each new document against the existing corpus and tell you exactly what problems it has.
landing.step1Text: Drag PDFs, Word files or connect Google Drive. Indexing is automatic.
landing.step2Text: The system detects issues against your existing corpus. Fix them before publishing.
landing.step3Text: Ask questions in chat and get answers with citations. Your team stops searching.
landing.plansDisclaimer: Prices in euros, excluding VAT. Cancel anytime.
landing.plansUsersLimit: {count, plural, one {Up to # user} other {Up to # users}}
landing.securityDesc: AES-256 encryption, organization isolation, and we never use your documents to train AI models. Each workspace is private and secure.
landing.ctaFinalDesc: Start free with 50 credits. No card. No commitment.
landing.faq1A: Yes. Each organization has its own isolated space. We use AES-256 encryption, Row Level Security in the database, and JWT validation on every request. Your documents are never shared with other companies or used to train AI models.
landing.faq2Q: What document formats do you accept?
landing.faq2A: PDF, Word (.docx), plain text (.txt), Markdown (.md), CSV, JSON and HTML. You can also import directly from Google Drive.
landing.faq3Q: What if the AI makes a mistake?
landing.faq3A: Doclity always shows the sources of its responses so you can verify them. Document analysis indicates the confidence level of each finding. We never promise 100% detection — we are a support tool, not a substitute for human judgment.
landing.faq4Q: Can I cancel at any time?
landing.faq4A: Yes, no lock-in. On cancellation you keep access until the end of the billing period, plus 90 grace days to export your data.
landing.faq5A: No. Upload your documents and start asking. No technical setup, no APIs to connect, nothing to install.

legal.disclaimer: This is an informational translation. The legally binding version is in Spanish.

aviso.s1Intro: Pursuant to Article 10 of Law 34/2002, of 11 July, on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce (LSSI-CE), users are informed of the details of the owner of this website:
aviso.s1ValueOwner: [PENDING — to be completed upon self-employment registration]
aviso.s1ValueActividad: Provision of corporate documentation management and AI-powered analysis services.
aviso.s2Body: This website offers the Doclity service, a corporate documentation management and analysis platform. Access to the service requires registration and is subject to the Terms and Conditions of use.
aviso.s3Body1: All website content (texts, design, source code, logos, graphics) is the property of the owner or its licensors, and is protected by intellectual and industrial property legislation. Reproduction, distribution or transformation without express authorisation is prohibited.
aviso.s3Body2: Users retain all rights over the documents they upload to the platform. Doclity does not acquire any ownership rights over user content.
aviso.s4Intro: The owner assumes no liability for:
aviso.s4Item1: Service interruptions due to technical reasons, maintenance or force majeure.
aviso.s4Item2: Decisions made by users based solely on the results of automatic analysis (results are indicative and do not replace human review).
aviso.s4Item3: Content uploaded by users that may infringe third-party rights.
aviso.s5Body: This legal notice is governed by Spanish law. For any dispute arising from the use of this website, the parties submit to the courts and tribunals of A Coruña, Spain.
aviso.footer: This legal notice applies to all Doclity users registered from its effective date.

cookies.s1Body: Cookies are small text files that websites store in your browser. They are used to ensure the site functions correctly, remember your session or collect information about your browsing.
cookies.s2Body1: Doclity uses only strictly necessary technical cookies for the operation of the service. We do not use tracking, analytics, advertising or third-party cookies.
cookies.s2Cookie1Purpose: Keep your session active after logging in
cookies.s2Cookie2Purpose: Renew your session without requiring you to log in again
cookies.s2Body2: These cookies are set by Supabase Auth, our authentication provider, and are essential for using the service. Without them, you would not be able to maintain an active session.
cookies.s3Body: No. In accordance with Article 22.2 of the LSSI-CE, technical or strictly necessary cookies are exempt from the requirement to obtain prior user consent, as they are essential for the operation of the service.
cookies.s4Body: You can configure your browser to block or delete cookies. However, if you block Doclity's session cookies, you will not be able to use the service.
cookies.s5Body: If you have any questions about our cookie policy, you can contact us at <email>doclitynfo@gmail.com</email>.
cookies.footer: This cookie policy applies to all Doclity users.

privacidad.s1Body: The data controller is the owner of Doclity, domiciled in A Coruña, Spain. For any queries related to the protection of your personal data, you can contact us at: <email>doclitynfo@gmail.com</email>.
privacidad.s2Sub1Body: Email address and password, managed by Supabase Auth. We do not collect name, phone number or postal address.
privacidad.s2Sub2Body: Documents you index on the platform are stored in Supabase (full text and metadata) and Pinecone (vectorised fragments for semantic search). They are only accessible to members of your organisation.
privacidad.s2Sub3Body: Questions you ask the assistant are recorded to generate internal usage statistics for your organisation. We do not use them to train models or share them with third parties.
privacidad.s2Sub4Body: Document analysis results (contradictions, duplicates, inconsistencies) are stored so you can consult them in your document intelligence panel.
privacidad.s2Sub5Body: Payment data (credit card) is managed entirely by Stripe. We do not store or have access to your card details.
privacidad.s2Sub6Body: We record usage information (endpoint used, AI model, tokens consumed, latency) for monitoring and billing purposes. We do not record personal data in these logs.
privacidad.s3Sub1Body: Answering your documentation questions, analysing documents, detecting contradictions and duplicates, and managing your account.
privacidad.s3Sub2Body: Managing your subscription, monitoring credit consumption and processing payments.
privacidad.s3Sub3Body: Showing you the document intelligence panel with usage, quality and coverage data for your documents. These statistics are only visible to administrators of your organisation.
privacidad.s3Sub4Body: We use aggregated and anonymised data to improve analysis quality. We never use your documents or queries to train AI models.
privacidad.s4Provider1Desc: Database storage, authentication and file storage.
privacidad.s4Provider3Desc: Natural language processing. Anthropic does not use API-submitted data to train its models.
privacidad.s4Provider6Desc: Running exhaustive analyses in the background.
privacidad.s4Footer: All these providers are located in the US or EU and provide adequate data protection guarantees.
privacidad.s5: How long we keep your data
privacidad.s5Body: While your account is active, we retain all your data to provide the service. If you cancel your subscription, we retain your data for a grace period of 90 days. After this period, we will proceed with deletion. Billing data is retained for as long as required by Spanish tax law (4 years).
privacidad.s6Intro: After the 90-day grace period following cancellation, we will delete:
privacidad.s6Item1: Your documents and their full text
privacidad.s6Item2: The Pinecone vectors associated with your organisation
privacidad.s6Body2: Aggregated usage data will be anonymised for internal statistics. You can request early deletion by contacting <email>doclitynfo@gmail.com</email>.
privacidad.s7Intro: Under the GDPR, you have the right to:
privacidad.s7Body2: To exercise these rights, write to us at <email>doclitynfo@gmail.com</email>. We will respond within a maximum of 30 days. If you consider that we have not adequately addressed your rights, you may lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (<aepd>www.aepd.es</aepd>).
privacidad.s8Intro: We implement the following technical and organisational measures:
privacidad.s8Item2: Data isolation by organisation (Row Level Security and namespaces)
privacidad.s9Body: Doclity does not use tracking or advertising cookies. We only use strictly necessary technical cookies to maintain your active session.
privacidad.s10Body: We may update this policy as necessary. We will notify you of any relevant changes through the application.
privacidad.footer: This policy applies to all Doclity users registered from its effective date.

terminos.h2: Doclity Terms and Conditions of Use
terminos.s1BodyBefore: These Terms and Conditions govern access to and use of Doclity, an AI-powered corporate documentation management and analysis platform, accessible from
terminos.s2Item1: A private chat that answers questions about the user's corporate documentation, with citations to sources.
terminos.s2Item2: Automatic document analysis upon upload, detecting duplicates, contradictions, overlaps and inconsistencies against the existing corpus.
terminos.s2Item3: An AI-assisted improvement mode for correcting documents through conversation.
terminos.s2Item5: Google Drive integration for synchronising documentation.
terminos.s3Body1: To use the service, registration with a valid email address is required.
terminos.s3Body2: Users are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their credentials.
terminos.s3Body3: Each user belongs to an organisation (workspace) with either an administrator or member role.
terminos.s4Item1: The service operates through monthly subscription plans with a credit pool shared by the organisation.
terminos.s4Item2: Each operation consumes a set number of credits according to its type.
terminos.s4Item3: Unused plan credits do not carry over between periods.
terminos.s4Item4: Extra credits purchased through top-ups do not expire.
terminos.s5Body1: Payments are processed through Stripe. Doclity does not store or have access to the user's card details.
terminos.s5Body3: The organisation administrator can manage their subscription, view invoices and change the payment method from the Stripe portal.
terminos.s6Body1: Documents uploaded by the user are and remain the property of the user.
terminos.s6Body2: Doclity does not use user documents to train artificial intelligence models or share them with third parties.
terminos.s6Body3: Documents are stored encrypted and isolated by organisation.
terminos.s7Intro: Users agree not to use the service to:
terminos.s7Item1: Store illegal content or content that infringes third-party rights.
terminos.s7Item2: Attempt to access data belonging to other organisations.
terminos.s7Item5: Share their credentials with unauthorised persons.
terminos.s7Outro: We reserve the right to suspend accounts that violate these conditions.
terminos.s8Body1: Doclity is offered "as is". We strive to keep the service available, but we do not guarantee uninterrupted availability or the absence of errors.
terminos.s8Body2: Document analysis is based on artificial intelligence and may not detect all existing discrepancies. Analysis results are indicative and do not replace human review.
terminos.s8Body3: We are not liable for decisions made based solely on the results of the service.
terminos.s9Body1: You can cancel your subscription at any time.
terminos.s9Body2: After cancellation, you will retain access until the end of the billing period.
terminos.s9Body3: Your data will be retained for an additional grace period of 90 days. After this period, deletion will proceed as described in the Privacy Policy.
terminos.s10Body: We may modify these terms as necessary. We will notify you of relevant changes through the application with at least 15 days notice. Continued use of the service after notification implies acceptance of the new terms.
terminos.s11Body: These terms are governed by Spanish law. For any dispute, the parties submit to the courts and tribunals of A Coruña, Spain.
terminos.s12Body: For any queries about these terms, you can write to us at <email>doclitynfo@gmail.com</email>.
terminos.footer: These terms apply to all Doclity users registered from their effective date.
